title: Flonters
body:
Current MOD provide:

  • Addition of flowers with variety of tall,
  • Addition of flowers with variety of potted, (include vanilla tall flower potted)
  • Addition generation of the world,
  • Based on the property settings of generation of the world,
  • Addition of the eggshell fertilizer as last resort gather of flower method

Open tab "Imagery" for visual example
